name: terms-of-service
description: Generate a clear, legally-structured Terms of Service template suitable for SaaS products, digital downloads, or online services.
input_description: Company name, product/service type, jurisdiction (country/state), subscription or one-time payment model, and any specific clauses needed (e.g., API usage, reselling restrictions).
output_description: Full Terms of Service document in Markdown with all standard sections: Acceptance, Account Terms, Payment, Intellectual Property, Prohibited Uses, Disclaimers, Limitation of Liability, Governing Law, and Contact.
